description: Recto: Legal document. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Monday, 16 Sivan 1769 Seleucid, which is 1458 CE. Under the reshut of the Nagid Yehosef. Location: Cairo. ʿAbd al-Laṭīf al-Levi b. Muhadhdhab known as Ibn ʿAbda(?) acknowledges a debt of 12,000 dirhams(!) that he owes to a woman named (Sitt al-)ʿAbīd bt. Sulaymān, the wife of al-Shamūsī b. Shemuel Tājir. Verso: Another legal document, dated Sunday, 7 Av 1770 Seleucid, which is 1459 CE. ʿAbīd attests that ʿAbd al-Laṭīf has repaid the debt in full. Join: Oded Zinger.
description_he: שטר משפטי, קהיר, יום שני 16 סיון 1769 לשטרות (1458): עבד אל-לטיף הלוי בן מוהדהב מודה בחוב 12,000 דרהם לסיתת-אל-עביד בת סולימאן. על הגב: שטר 1459 — אישור פירעון מלא החוב.
